title: bank_account
subject:
Write a program that simulates a bank account. Model it with a class that has a balance starting at 0 and methods deposit(amount) and withdraw(amount). A withdrawal that exceeds the current balance is refused (ignored, balance unchanged).

Read commands from standard input, one per line: either "deposit N" or "withdraw N" (N a positive integer). After processing all commands, print the final balance followed by a newline.

Example input:
  deposit 100
  withdraw 30
  withdraw 1000
Expected output:
  70
